headline: DASH Drives Growth Through Broader Commerce Platform Offerings
summary: DoorDash expands its merchant network through Shopify and Dollar Tree deals as competition and tech investments pressure margins.

headline: Domino’s gets a boost from order count growth in Q2
summary: The fast-food pizza chain reported U.S. same-store sales growth of 0.1%.
